hero.headline: Unlock the full power of your job search
hero.subheadline: Tailor every resume, generate every cover letter, and track unlimited opportunities - all in one place.
hero.trust: Cancel anytime · Secure payment via Paddle

annual.title: Pro Annual
annual.description: Best value. Pay once, save big.

features.title: Everything in Pro:
list: 150 AI operations per month (vs 10 on Free)
Unlimited active jobs in your tracker
AI-generated cover letters with multiple variants
Smart job description parsing — paste and go
Analytics dashboard to track your progress

comparison.title: Free vs Pro at a glance

cancel.title: Cancel anytime
cancel.description: No lock-in contracts. Cancel your subscription instantly from your dashboard, no questions asked.

refresh.title: Limits reset monthly
refresh.description: Your AI operation allowance refreshes every billing cycle so you always have capacity when you need it.

global.title: Works everywhere
global.description: Light Role supports multiple languages and currencies so your job search has no borders.

cancel.a: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from the billing settings page. Your Pro access continues until the end of the current billing period.

difference.q: What is the difference between Free and Pro?
difference.a: The Free plan gives you 10 AI operations per month and up to 5 active jobs. Pro unlocks 150 AI operations, unlimited active jobs, all resume templates, analytics, and priority AI processing.

payment.a: Payments are securely handled by Paddle, a trusted Merchant of Record. Your card details are never stored on our servers.

switch.q: Can I switch between monthly and annual?
switch.a: Yes. You can switch billing cycles from the billing settings page at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing period.

refund.a: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on annual plans. For monthly plans, you may cancel before the next renewal to avoid being charged again.

footer.headline: Ready to land your next role faster?

errors.plansLoadFailed: Could not load plans. Please try again.
errors.pricesFallback: Showing default prices. Local currency unavailable.

dialog.title: Send feedback
dialog.description: Help us improve Light Role. Share bugs, ideas, or anything on your mind.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us what is on your mind...

error.rate_limit: You can submit feedback once per hour. Please try again later.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and security settings.

account.heading: Account
account.description: Update your personal information and email address.

security.heading: Security
security.description: Manage your password and account security.

notifications.heading: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Manage which notifications you receive from Light Role.

resume.heading: Resume preferences
resume.description: Choose the section order and font that future tailored resumes will start from.

infoBanner.title: These settings affect future generations only
infoBanner.body: Existing tailored resumes keep the section order and font they were generated with. Changes here apply to resumes you generate after saving.

sectionOrder.title: Section order
sectionOrder.description: Drag to reorder. Personal info always appears at the top of the resume.

font.title: Font
font.description: Pick the typeface for your resume. Each option is shown in its own font.
font.label: Resume font
font.hint: All five fonts are professional sans-serifs that render cleanly in PDF.

saveError.network: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
saveError.validation: We couldn't save those changes. Please refresh the page and try again.

resume.loadError: Couldn't load your resume preferences. Please refresh the page.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage the source-of-truth information used to tailor your resumes and cover letters.

common.saveErrorToast: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
common.loadErrorMessage: Couldn't load your profile. Please refresh the page.

reupload.title: Reupload your resume
reupload.subtitle: Supports PDF and DOCX (max 10 MB)
reupload.errorToast: Couldn't parse the resume. Please try a different file.
reupload.invalidFormat: Only PDF and DOCX files are supported.

emptyState.title: Let's set up your profile
emptyState.subtitle: Upload your resume to auto-fill every section, or start from scratch and edit each tab manually.

uploadCard.title: Upload your resume
uploadCard.description: We'll parse it with AI and pre-fill all sections./a

manualCard.title: Or fill out manually
manualCard.description: Skip the upload and edit each section yourself, starting with Personal Info.

unsavedDialog.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedDialog.description: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

personalInfo.heading: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Your contact details and links. Used as the header on every resume and cover letter.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: List the skills you want to showcase. Reorder later in the resume editor.

profileSummary.heading: Profile Summary
profileSummary.description: A short paragraph that introduces you. The AI uses this as a starting point when tailoring resumes.
profileSummary.label: Summary
profileSummary.placeholder: Senior software engineer with 8 years building distributed systems...

languages.heading: Languages
languages.description: Languages you speak — written and spoken. Optional proficiency levels arrive in a future update.

employment.heading: Employment
employment.description: Your work history. Drag to reorder, edit or delete each entry.
employment.detailsPlaceholder:
Led a team of 5 engineers...
Shipped 3 major features...
employment.empty: No employment yet. Click "Add Position" to get started.

education.heading: Education
education.empty: No education entries yet. Click "Add Education" to get started.

certificates.heading: Certificates
certificates.name: Name
certificates.empty: No certificates yet. Click "Add Certificate" to get started.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.description: Personal or professional projects worth showcasing.
projects.name: Name
projects.detailsPlaceholder:
Built X using Y...
Shipped to Z users...
projects.empty: No projects yet. Click "Add Project" to get started.

achievements.heading: Achievements
achievements.title: Title

volunteer.detailsPlaceholder:
Coordinated weekend food drives...
Mentored 8 students...

analytics.page_subtitle: Track your job search progress and performance over time.
analytics.funnel_empty: No applications yet — start tracking jobs to see your funnel.
analytics.resume_empty: No scored resumes yet. Tailor a resume to see how it performs.
analytics.response_time_empty: Apply to a job and wait for your first response to see this metric.
analytics.upgrade_overlay_aria_label: Upgrade to Pro to unlock Analytics
analytics.upgrade_description: Get deep insights into your job search — conversion funnel, resume performance, response times, and more.
analytics.insufficient_headline: Almost there — keep tracking your search to unlock analytics
analytics.insufficient_description: Analytics unlocks once you have enough data. Keep going!
analytics.error_generic: Something went wrong loading your analytics. Please try again.
analytics.error_boundary_message: Something went wrong loading your analytics. We've been notified.

toast.success: Your message has been sent. Check your inbox for our reply.
